Created: YYYY-MM-DD
Type: Organization Progress
Book Title:
Author:
Status: In Progress
Conversion Strategy: chapter-by-chapter / after finishing the whole book
Total Chapters: number
Completed Chapters: number
Completion Percentage: number%
Pending Insights: number
Converted Insights: number
Discarded Insights: number
---

# Reading Organization Progress

## 📖 Basic Info
Write the book title, author, organization mode, and start time.

## 🎯 Reading Motivation
Write the core purpose of this reading.

## 📋 Batch Plan
Write the topic, status, and completion time for each batch.

## 📚 Chapter Progress
Write total chapters, completed chapters, current chapter, and next chapter.

## 🔁 Conversion Strategy and Status
Write whether this book uses chapter-by-chapter card conversion or conversion after finishing the whole book, plus the current conversion status.

## 🧭 Chapter Index
Write the major chapter list (chapter name + starting line number).

## 📐 Chapter Range Statistics
Write each chapter's line range and statistics: highlights, thoughts, and thought blocks.

## 💡 Extracted Insights
Write the key insights extracted in this round by batch.

## 🗂️ Candidate Insight Pool
Record candidate insights and status: pending conversion / converted / discarded.

## 📝 Session Log
Write what this session completed and what was learned.

## 📄 Output Files
Write paths for the literature note and subsequent card notes.

## 💭 Notes
Write supplementary information that needs follow-up.
